reasoning: The failure originated at the A1 interface due to 'hard errors' (packet loss and retransmissions) which caused downstream propagation to the F1-c interface. The causal chain confirms that F1-c latency depends on A1 metrics.
actionable_steps: 1. Audit A1 interface physical and logical links between Non-RT RIC and Near-RT RIC. 2. Inspect for hardware faults (Cables/SFP modules) or network congestion. 3. Validate A1 configuration and MTU settings to minimize fragmentation.
